# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom build command')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom test script')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_STEP', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom deployment step')
    }

    environment {
        ALLOWED_COMMANDS = ['build', 'test', 'deploy']
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Input') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.BUILD_COMMAND || !params.TEST_SCRIPT || !params.DEPLOY_STEP) {
                        error('All parameters must be provided.')
                    }
                    
                    def validateCommand = { cmd ->
                        if (!ALLOWED_COMMANDS.contains(cmd)) {
                            error("Command '${cmd}' is not allowed.")
                        }
                    }
                    
                    validateCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND)
                    validateCommand(params.TEST_SCRIPT)
                    validateCommand(params.DEPLOY_STEP)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "echo Executing build command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    // Execute build command securely
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "echo Executing test script: ${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                    // Execute test script securely
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "echo Executing deploy step: ${params.DEPLOY_STEP}"
                    // Execute deploy step securely
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
